home.story_section_subtitle: A journey from solo to a full team
home.story_node1_desc: Started running a cattery in Osaka, drowning in content for 5 platforms — Instagram, TikTok, Xiaohongshu, breeder sites, and LINE. All solo.
home.story_node2_desc: Discovered AI could help manage content and started experimenting with OpenClaw's multi-instance setup. Solo operations became human-AI collaboration.
home.story_node3_desc: 4 AI assistants in place — Yuki for engineering, Natsu for SNS, Haru for business, Aki always by my side. No longer carrying everything alone.
home.story_node4_desc: Launched this AI blog to document it all. From failures to breakthroughs, from one person to a team — a story of a regular person growing alongside AI.

about.bio:
Living in Harinakano, Osaka. Running Fuluck Cattery (Siberian cat specialist breeder) while also operating Fuluck AI, providing AI integration and training services.

I work daily with 4 AI assistants — Yuki handles technical architecture and development, Natsu manages SNS operations and content creation, Haru takes care of business support and client communications, and Aki serves as my mobile companion. Each has its own personality and strengths, like a real little team. Yuki runs data analysis overnight, Natsu crafts compelling Japanese copy, Haru meticulously handles administrative paperwork, and Aki stands by during my commute.

From automated cat profile management to AI customer service for clinics, to smart multi-platform SNS distribution — this blog is a real record of my AI journey. Not the grand narrative of "AI changing the world," but the real story of a solopreneur using AI to run a small business better and live a more balanced life. Successes, failures, daily reflections, and the everyday moments of Osaka life — it's all here.

Technology isn't the goal — making life better is.

cattery.title: Cattery Journal
cattery.subtitle: Life with Siberians in Osaka
cattery.page_desc: Daily life at Fulluck Cattery — living with Siberian cats in Osaka
cattery.headline: A closer look at daily life inside Fulluck Cattery.
cattery.intro_body: This section documents the real rhythm of the cattery in Osaka: kitten growth, parent cat care, space management, customer communication, and how AI helps keep daily operations lighter and more consistent.
cattery.highlight_1_body: Ranked #1 nationwide on Minna no Koneko Breeder for H1 2025 with a perfect review score.
cattery.highlight_2_body: Daily care, socialization, and in-person visits all happen from our base in Osaka Joto Ward.
cattery.highlight_3_body: From first inquiry to post-adoption follow-up, LINE remains the core communication channel.
cattery.daily_intro: Not just cat photos, but the real overlap between breeding, care, documentation, and customer support.
cattery.post_1_title: Kitten development is the most important timeline in the cattery.
cattery.post_1_body: We track weaning, weight, temperament, and socialization so future families can see steady development instead of isolated snapshots.
cattery.post_2_title: Cleanliness and space design are part of trust.
cattery.post_2_body: Temperature, humidity, traffic flow, and daily cleaning all shape the cats' condition and the confidence visitors feel when they arrive.
cattery.post_3_title: Communication should feel supportive, not transactional.
cattery.post_3_body: From early inquiries to post-home adjustment, the goal is consistent guidance and long-term trust rather than one-off sales talk.
cattery.siberian_intro: Siberians are known for their presence and dense coats, but they also need thoughtful care and a stable home environment.
cattery.info_1_title: Rich coats need calm, consistent grooming
cattery.info_1_body: During shedding season, regular brushing matters most when it stays gentle and predictable enough for the cat to feel safe.
cattery.info_2_title: People-oriented cats do well with active family interaction
cattery.info_2_body: Siberians often stay curious about people, so early socialization and exposure to everyday routines make a big difference.
cattery.info_3_title: Breeding priorities: health, temperament, and long-term fit
cattery.info_3_body: Beyond looks, Fulluck Cattery focuses on health management, breeding planning, and how smoothly each cat adapts to a new home.
cattery.contact_title: If you want to know the current cattery situation, start with LINE.
cattery.contact_body: For visits, reservation plans, home setup questions, or care guidance, the easiest path is to contact us through the official cattery site first.
cattery.contact_line_note: LINE: Reach out through the contact flow on the Fulluck Cattery website
